settings.heading: FAQ
settings.subcopy: Fit, sizing, shipping and the 5%. Can't find it? Get in touch.

settings.question: What's the difference between Fem-Fit and Men-Fit?
settings.answer: Fem-Fit is drafted from a women's body block — not a resized men's pattern. Men-Fit uses a men's block. They're separate products, so choose by the fit you want.

settings.question: How do I choose my size?
settings.answer: See our size guide. Fem-Fit runs in numeric sizes 6–14; Men-Fit in S–XL. If you're between sizes, size up for layering under match kit.

settings.question: Is your kit really made in the UK?
settings.answer: Our garments are cut and sewn in Britain and carry a "Made in UK" label. (Sourcing is confirmed per line before launch.)

settings.question: What is the 5% commitment?
settings.answer: Five percent of every order funds research into women's rugby — injury prevention, performance and participation. It's audited annually and reported openly. Read more.

settings.question: Shipping and returns?
settings.answer: Free UK shipping over £75. Unworn items can be returned within 30 days. See our shipping & returns policy for details.

settings.question: How should I care for my kit?
settings.answer: Cold wash, inside out, no fabric softener, hang to dry. It's built to take a season of contact — treat it well and it lasts.
